name: Icon Feature Grid
description: Icon-driven feature grid rendered as an asymmetric bento (one wide hero card + smaller tiles) or alternating zigzag — explicitly avoids the three-equal-card horizontal row that screams AI default.

descriptions.descriptive: A 6-column desktop grid where the lead feature spans four columns as a dark emphasized card, and the remaining tiles fall into a 3-up rhythm with periodic 4-column wider cards interrupting the cadence. Icons are softly tinted in a primary-coloured rounded square; the emphasized card inverts to a high-contrast surface.
descriptions.usage: Default landing-page features section for SaaS, productised services, and B2B product pages — anywhere you want 4-7 capabilities laid out without falling into the symmetrical 3-card row. The bento variant pairs with editorial heroes; zigzag suits content-heavy briefs that want a calmer rhythm.
descriptions.audienceFit: B2B SaaS, infrastructure tooling, design systems, and enterprise solution pages. The asymmetric structure rewards skim-readers (one big card with the lead claim) without burying secondary capabilities.
